description: Style Note jealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe. Wear it with form fitting denims and a blazer, style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes. Product Details White sleeveless round neck top that has horizontal pin tucks on the chest in an asymmetric design and a bow on the left chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash delicate in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, scrub, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:5'8" and chest:33") is wearing a size M
